OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Mercy Housing Clinic is present. Represented by Kevin Alcar.
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Luis Arlequin, is present.
Attorney, Erin Dougherty, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Ernest Haperlin, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUN-21-2010 is vacated.
